title: MBTI Personality Test
subtitle: Explore your true self based on Jung's theory of psychological types

hero.badge: Based on Jung's Theory of Psychological Types
hero.title: Discover Your
hero.subtitle: The MBTI personality test helps you understand your true self and discover your strengths and direction for growth

versions.title: Choose Test Version
versions.subtitle: Select the appropriate version based on your time and needs

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Quickly understand your basic personality type

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: In-depth analysis of your personality traits and cognitive patterns

scientific.title: Scientific Theory
scientific.description: Based on Jung's theory of psychological types, verified over decades

accurate.title: Accurate Analysis
accurate.description: Multi-dimensional in-depth analysis, comprehensively showing personality traits

personalized.title: Personalized Report
personalized.description: Generate exclusive reports tailored to your unique personality type

personalities.title: 16 Personality Types
personalities.subtitle: Discover the uniqueness of each personality type

footer.basedOn: Based on Jung's Theory of Psychological Types

INTJ.name: INTJ
INTJ.title: Architect
INTJ.subtitle: Imaginative strategic thinkers
INTJ.description: Imaginative and strategic thinkers, with a plan for everything

INTP.name: INTP
INTP.title: Logician
INTP.subtitle: Innovative inventors
INTP.description: Innovative inventors with an unquenchable thirst for knowledge

ENTP.name: ENTP
ENTP.title: Debater
ENTP.subtitle: Smart curious thinkers
ENTP.description: Smart and curious thinkers who cannot resist an intellectual challenge

INFJ.name: INFJ
INFJ.title: Advocate
INFJ.subtitle: Quiet idealists
INFJ.description: Quiet and mystical, yet inspiring and tireless idealists

INFP.name: INFP
INFP.title: Mediator
INFP.subtitle: Poetic altruists
INFP.description: Kind and generous altruists, always eager to help a good cause

ENFJ.name: ENFJ
ENFJ.title: Protagonist
ENFJ.subtitle: Charismatic motivators
ENFJ.description: Charismatic and inspiring leaders, able to mesmerize their listeners

ENFP.name: ENFP
ENFP.title: Campaigner
ENFP.subtitle: Enthusiastic free spirits
ENFP.description: Enthusiastic, creative and sociable free spirits, who can always find a reason to smile

ISTJ.name: ISTJ
ISTJ.title: Logistician
ISTJ.subtitle: Practical reliable organizers
ISTJ.description: Practical and fact-minded individuals, whose reliability cannot be doubted

ISFJ.name: ISFJ
ISFJ.title: Defender
ISFJ.subtitle: Dedicated warm protectors
ISFJ.description: Very dedicated and warm protectors, always ready to defend their loved ones

ESTJ.name: ESTJ
ESTJ.title: Executive
ESTJ.subtitle: Efficient managers
ESTJ.description: Excellent administrators, unsurpassed at managing things or people

ESFJ.name: ESFJ
ESFJ.title: Consul
ESFJ.subtitle: Warm cooperative partners
ESFJ.description: Extraordinarily caring, social and popular people, always eager to help

explorers.title: Explorers
explorers.subtitle: Experience & Creation
explorers.description: Flexible, living in the moment, willing to try

ISTP.name: ISTP
ISTP.title: Virtuoso
ISTP.subtitle: Calm experimenters
ISTP.description: Bold and practical experimenters, masters of all kinds of tools

ISFP.name: ISFP
ISFP.title: Adventurer
ISFP.subtitle: Flexible artists
ISFP.description: Flexible and charming artists, always ready to explore and experience something new

ESTP.name: ESTP
ESTP.title: Entrepreneur
ESTP.subtitle: Energetic doers
ESTP.description: Smart, energetic and very perceptive people, who truly enjoy living on the edge

ESFP.name: ESFP
ESFP.title: Entertainer
ESFP.subtitle: Spontaneous performers
ESFP.description: Spontaneous, energetic and enthusiastic entertainers – life is never boring around them

tips.content: Please answer based on your first instinct. There are no right or wrong answers.
